calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Curtis F. Dowling of Beckman & Marquez, 495-8500, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MAREE QUINTANA'S Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions is denied. CCP section 1161.2 requires defendant to have prevailed, which she did not. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, MAR-28-07: CURTIS F. DOWLING, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANT MAREE QUINTANA APPEARS IN PROPRIA THIS DAY.

PRIOR TO A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEING HELD, THE CASE SETTLES; TRIAL DATE REMOVED.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-218).
